message:
fix(daemon): push dolt remotes on shutdown before stopping server

Calls pushDoltRemotes() during graceful shutdown, ensuring pending
changes are committed and pushed before the Dolt server stops.
Respects existing patrol config — only pushes if dolt_remotes patrol
is enabled. (gt-kzddch)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
